---
title: "Package Notebooks"
---

This page contains links to the individual notebooks per package. In the notebook, each package is run against all the datasets with results and plots stored.

<div class = "row text-center">
<div class = "col-md-6">
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-amore.html" target = "_blank">AMORE</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-ann2.html" target = "_blank">ANN2</a> <br> 
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-automl.html" target = "_blank">AutoML</a>  <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-brnn.html" target = "_blank">brnn</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-cadence.html" target = "_blank">CaDENCE</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-deepnet.html" target = "_blank">Deepnet</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-elmnnrcpp.html" target = "_blank">elmNNrcpp</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-elmr.html" target = "_blank">ELMR</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-h2o.html" target = "_blank">h2o</a> <br> 
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-keras.html" target = "_blank">Keras</a> <br> 
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-monmlp.html" target = "_blank">monomlp</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-qrnn.html" target = "_blank">qrnn</a> <br> <br>
</div>


<div class = "col-md-6">
</div>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-MachineShop.html" target = "_blank">MachineShop</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-nnet.html" target = "_blank">nnet</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-radiantmodel.html" target = "_blank">radiant.model</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-rminer.html" target = "_blank">rminer</a> <br>
<a href="notebooks/NNbenchmark-nb-tsensembler.html" target = "_blank">tsensembler</a> <br>
</div>
